title: Saraswati Puja 2025: School Comes Alive with Devotion and Cultural Fervour
excerpt: The entire school community united for the grandest Saraswati Puja celebration yet — magnificent idol, vibrant pushpanjali, Rabindra Nritya, and an evening cultural programme that left everyone spellbound.
body:
Sajj Global School's Saraswati Puja 2025 was nothing short of spectacular. The school grounds were transformed into a festive arena as students, teachers, and parents gathered to invoke the blessings of Maa Saraswati — the goddess of knowledge, music, and the arts.

The beautifully crafted idol was consecrated at 8:00 AM, followed by a vibrant pushpanjali ceremony where all students offered flowers with devotion and joy. The fragrance of dhoop, the sound of conch shells and bells, and the sight of students dressed in traditional white and yellow attire made for a deeply moving morning.

The evening cultural programme was the true highlight — Class VI presented a Rabindra Nritya, Class IX staged a Bengali drama based on a Tagore short story, the school choir performed traditional Saraswati Vandana, and senior students organised a sitaar recital.

"Saraswati Puja is not merely a ritual — it is a reminder to every child that the pursuit of knowledge is sacred," said Dr. Chandana Bhattacharya, Principal. The event was attended by over 700 parents and honoured guests from across Kolkata.
author: SGS Communications

title: Exceptional Board Results: 100% Pass Rate, Kolkata District Topper from SGS
excerpt: Sajj Global School celebrates outstanding CBSE board results — 16 students above 95%, with Rishita Ghosh emerging as Kolkata District Topper in Science with 98.4% aggregate.
body:
We are thrilled to announce that Sajj Global School has once again achieved exceptional results in the CBSE Board Examinations for Classes X and XII. All appearing students have passed, maintaining the school's unbroken record of 100% pass rate for the seventh consecutive year.

Of particular pride, 16 students secured above 95% aggregate marks. Rishita Ghosh of Class XII (Science) emerged as the Kolkata District Topper with a remarkable 98.4% aggregate, and Aryan Bose of Class X scored a perfect 100 in Mathematics.

The school's performance ranked among the best in the Rajarhat-Newtown educational zone. In Science stream, the average aggregate was 89.2%, while Commerce saw 87.6% and Humanities 86.4%.

The results reflect the relentless dedication of our faculty and the hard work of our students. Principal Dr. Chandana Bhattacharya congratulated every student and thanked parents for their unwavering support throughout the academic year.
author: SGS Communications

title: Rabindra Jayanti 2024: A Soulful Tribute to Gurudev Tagore
excerpt: The school organised a grand Rabindra Jayanti programme with Rabindra Nritya, Rabindra Sangeet, and a theatrical presentation of Tagore's timeless works — drawing praise from across Kolkata.
body:
On the occasion of the 163rd birth anniversary of Rabindranath Tagore, Sajj Global School paid a heartfelt tribute to the great poet, philosopher, and Nobel Laureate through a grand cultural programme held at the school auditorium.

The event featured over 14 cultural acts across the afternoon — Rabindra Nritya by Classes VI, VIII, and X, a choir presenting Tagore's famous compositions including 'Amar Shonar Bangla' and 'Ekla Cholo Re', and a dramatic enactment of 'Dak Ghar' by the Class XII drama club. The stage was adorned with traditional alpana patterns and floral arrangements, filling the auditorium with warmth and reverence.

Chief Guest Mr. Suman Banerjee, a Tagore scholar from Jadavpur University, addressed the gathering: "In these children's performances, I see the living spirit of Gurudev — the belief that art, education, and human connection are inseparable."

The programme was attended by over 500 parents, alumni, and guests from across Kolkata. The school also unveiled a dedicated 'Rabindra Kona' in the library — a reading corner with Tagore's complete works, available to all students.
author: SGS Communications

title: SGS Wins Overall Championship at Kolkata District Inter-School Sports Meet
excerpt: Our athletes brought home 15 gold medals and the Overall Championship Trophy at the Kolkata District Sports Meet held at Kishore Bharati Krirangan, Behala.
body:
Sajj Global School's sports contingent delivered a sterling performance at the Annual Kolkata District Inter-School Sports Meet, held at the legendary Kishore Bharati Krirangan in Behala. The school won the Overall Championship for the second consecutive year, bagging 15 gold, 10 silver, and 8 bronze medals across athletics, swimming, badminton, and football.

Standout performances came from Arnab Mondal who clinched double gold in 100m and 200m sprint events, the girls' football team who remained unbeaten throughout the tournament, and Pritha Roy who set a new district record in the long jump with a leap of 5.42 metres.

"This victory belongs equally to every child who trained through the monsoon heat and every parent who supported their child's sporting dreams," said Coach Ratan Das.

Chairman Mr. Salim Khan felicitated the champion athletes at a special school assembly and announced upgrades to the athletics track and swimming pool facilities.
author: SGS Sports Desk

title: Annual Science Exhibition 2024: Young Kolkata Innovators Shine
excerpt: Over 140 students from Classes VI–XII presented remarkable projects at the science fair. A blockchain-based attendance system and a solar water purifier won top honours, judged by faculty from IIT Kharagpur.
body:
Sajj Global School's Annual Science Exhibition 2024 was a showcase of young scientific brilliance. Held over two days in the school's main auditorium, the event saw participation from more than 140 students across Classes VI to XII.

Highlights included a solar-powered water purification model by Class X, a blockchain-based school attendance system by Class XII, and an IoT-enabled air quality monitoring device by Class IX. Judges from IIT Kharagpur and Jadavpur University — two of Bengal's most prestigious technical institutions — lauded the depth of research and practical application.

Principal Dr. Chandana Bhattacharya addressed the gathering: "Science is not just a subject here — it is a way of questioning the world around us. These young minds are the innovators Kolkata and West Bengal need."

The top two projects will represent the school at the West Bengal State Science Olympiad in September. Parents and guests from across Kolkata's Newtown district attended the event, filling the auditorium to capacity.
author: SGS Communications

title: Admissions Open for Academic Year 2025–26 at Our Newtown Campus
excerpt: Registration is now open for Classes Nursery through XI at Sajj Global School, Newtown, Kolkata. Apply online or visit our Admission Office on Action Area IID.
body:
Sajj Global School is pleased to announce that admissions for the Academic Year 2025–26 are now open at our Newtown, Kolkata campus. We are accepting applications for all classes from Nursery to Class XI.

Admission to Classes I–IX is based on a simple, age-appropriate interaction and assessment. Class XI admissions are based on Class X CBSE board results and a subject counselling session with senior faculty.

Parents in Kolkata's Newtown, Rajarhat, Salt Lake, VIP Road, and surrounding areas are encouraged to submit the online enquiry form or visit the Admission Office at our Action Area IID campus between 9 AM and 2 PM on weekdays.

The last date for submission of applications is 31st January 2025. For families relocating to Kolkata, we offer special orientation and counselling sessions — please contact the Admissions Office to schedule a campus visit.
author: Admissions Office
